subject: English
title: Iswaran the Storyteller – Medium Short Notes

key_points: Mahendra works as a junior supervisor and frequently moves between remote construction sites
Iswaran accompanies Mahendra everywhere and manages household work
Iswaran enjoys reading Tamil thriller books which influence his storytelling style
He narrates dramatic stories including the incident of a mad elephant
He also tells a frightening ghost story about a female spirit
The lonely setting and Iswaran’s stories influence Mahendra’s imagination
characters: Mahendra – A rational man who initially does not believe in ghosts
Iswaran – A creative and dramatic storyteller influenced by thriller books
literary_devices: Suspense – Maintains curiosity throughout the story
Hyperbole – Exaggeration used in Iswaran’s storytelling
Imagery – Vivid description of scenes and characters
exam_tips: Explain how Iswaran’s storytelling influences Mahendra
Focus on the elephant episode and the ghost story
Mention the contrast between Mahendra and Iswaran
Highlight the role of imagination in the story
